summary_blurb: No new events were provided in the refresh bundle, so the MAR thesis remains unchanged. Confidence and action stay stable; only the review timestamps are advanced to today with the next check pushed out on the existing cadence.
next_must_check_data: Next earnings: RevPAR mix, corporate travel commentary, forward bookings, and cash return guidance.

key_events.title: High-end and international travel stayed firm while lower-end US demand softened.
2026 guidance stayed intact despite a small EPS miss.

key_action_rules.condition: Corporate travel and forward bookings improve while international RevPAR remains strong.
key_action_rules.action: Add selectively after management confirms trend persistence.

key_action_rules.condition: Premium segment demand softens without offsetting business-travel recovery.
key_action_rules.action: Trim and keep only defensive core size.

key_action_rules.condition: High-end and business travel weaken together in a deeper recession.
